notableEvents.label: Griffin Conine pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Griffin Conine homers (3) on a fly ball to right field. Xavier Edwards scores. Kyle Stowers scores.

notableEvents.label: Owen Caissie pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Owen Caissie singles on a line drive to right fielder Troy Johnston.

notableEvents.label: Owen Caissie pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Owen Caissie singles on a ground ball to third baseman Kyle Karros.

notableEvents.label: Kyle Stowers GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Kyle Stowers grounds into a double play, first baseman TJ Rumfield to shortstop Ezequiel Tovar to first baseman TJ Rumfield. Heriberto Hernández out at 2nd. Kyle Stowers out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Kyle Stowers rally-killer GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Kyle Stowers grounds into a double play, first baseman TJ Rumfield to shortstop Ezequiel Tovar to first baseman TJ Rumfield. Heriberto Hernández out at 2nd. Kyle Stowers out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Cycle game
notableEvents.detail: Team hit a single, double, triple, and home run
